steps.assistant_text: Byte-identical TWIN-PORT of the landed kernel func_80002BA8 (kernel_056). find-masked-twins.py grouped them into a strict-signature cluster; reloc-masked word comparison showed all 24 words equal. Both are the 64-bit-by-short divmod (*quot = val/d; *rem = val%d), a 0x60-byte ddivu body with NO relocs. The function needs -O1 -mips3 (ddivu/ld/sd) which game_libs_post1b2c (default -O2 -mips2) cannot use TU-wide, so the -O1 -mips3 donor (game_libs_o1_6C8AC.c) was compiled and spliced into game_libs_post1b2c.c.o via REPLACE_FUNC_BODY. The donor's standalone .text is byte-identical to the target; the splice (0x70->0x60) leaves the TRUNCATE_TEXT 0x3D94 boundary intact.

metadata.verification: objdiff report.json fuzzy_match_percent=100.0; build/.o vs expected/.o function bytes byte-identical (96 bytes, no relocs); standalone donor .text byte-identical to target .s; full `make` ROM byte-identical to baserom; make verify-blocks OK.
